# theba.sh - July 22, 2026
*31 sources · ranked by impact · automated fallback edition assembled from ranked source feeds (model request failed)*
---
## stdout // the big story
### Evaluating LLM Models *[funding]* - I needed a fast way to compare open-source models for a long-context agent project. Instead of trusting public leaderboards, I built a lightweight evaluation harness that calls multiple models through Oxlo.ai and scores their outputs with a dedicated judge. Because Oxlo.ai

### Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web *[breakthrough]* - With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.
